expectations: Typed MRTR InputRequiredResult handling for sampling, elicitation, and roots-adjacent workflows
Product-level pagination, cache, and retry policy above request streams

expectations: Stable and preview Apps profiles behind explicit extension exports
notImplementedInWP4: McpTasks and task-heavy examples remain excluded from the core build

expectations: Complete API documentation and compiling consumer matrix
